title: 学完 Spring Boot 再看 FastAPI，我破防了
abstract: 学完 Spring Boot 再看 FastAPI，我破防了 stands out in the LLM landscape with strong reasoning, long context windows, and tool-calling support. Developer adoption speaks for itself.
abstract_zh: 学完 **Spring Boot 再看 FastAPI**，就像从苦逼程序员变成了快乐星球人！效率嗖嗖提升，从此告别代码的漫长等待。快来一起破防吧！
